## Verses (13)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | The king will be glad in your strength, O Lord; how great will be his delight in your salvation! | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | You have given him his heart's desire, and have not kept back the request of his lips. (Selah.) | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | For you go before him with the blessings of good things: you put a crown of fair gold on his head. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | He made request to you for life, and you gave it to him, long life for ever and ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | His glory is great in your salvation: honour and authority have you put on him. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | For you have made him a blessing for ever: you have given him joy in the light of your face. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | For the king has faith in the Lord, and through the mercy of the Most High he will not be moved. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | Your hand will make a search for all your haters; your right hand will be hard on all those who are against you. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | You will make them like a flaming oven before you; the Lord in his wrath will put an end to them, and they will be burned up in the fire. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | Their fruit will be cut off from the earth, and their seed from among the children of men. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | For their thoughts were bitter against you: they had an evil design in their minds, which they were not able to put into effect. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | Their backs will be turned when you make ready the cords of your bow against their faces. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | Be lifted up, O Lord, in your strength; so will we make songs in praise of your power. | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
